name: Fontana
description_short: Fontana Federal Credit Union is an NCUA-insured, member-owned credit union in California offering savings accounts, certificates, auto loans, personal loans, and home loans with competitive rates.
description_long:
Fontana Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative headquartered in Fontana, California, operating since at least the early 2000s. As an NCUA-insured institution, member deposits are federally protected up to $250,000. The credit union serves its membership community with traditional financial products and services aligned with the cooperative credit union model.

The institution offers a range of financial products including share savings accounts, certificates of deposit (currently featuring 6-month CDs at 3.81-4.07% APY), and multiple loan products. Auto loans are available starting as low as 4.50% APR for new vehicles and 4.75% APR for used vehicles (with automatic payment discount). Personal lending includes signature loans from 10.95% APR and lines of credit from 12.25% APR. Home loans and home banking services are also available, along with standard credit union services like check reordering, debit card management, and ATM access.

Fontana FCU differentiates itself as a locally-rooted community credit union with a single physical location, emphasizing personalized member service and compliance with fair lending practices. The institution maintains accessible online banking, financial calculators, and tools like AutoLand for vehicle financing. They provide identity theft protection services and operate with transparent fee schedules and privacy policies available to members.

As a smaller, single-location credit union, Fontana FCU serves members seeking traditional banking services with credit union advantages (member ownership, competitive rates, federal insurance). However, prospective members should note the limited physical accessibility (one branch only) and operational hours (9 AM-5 PM weekdays with lunch closure), which may not suit those requiring extended availability or multiple locations.
services: New auto loans (from 4.50% APR with autopay discount)
Used auto loans (from 4.75% APR with autopay discount)
Home banking and online account access
Debit card services and lost/stolen card replacement (1-888-241-2510)
Financial calculators and AutoLand vehicle financing tool
pros: NCUA-insured deposits up to $250,000 with full faith and credit backing
Competitive auto loan rates: 4.50% APR new, 4.75% APR used (with autopay discount)
Certificate special offerings: 6-month CDs at 4.07% APY ($10K minimum) and 3.81% APY ($5K minimum)
Home loans and home banking available for member convenience
Member-owned cooperative structure with transparent fee schedules and privacy policies
Lost/stolen debit card hotline (1-888-241-2510) for emergency card management
Financial calculators and AutoLand tool for loan comparison and planning
cons: Single physical location in Fontana, CA — limited accessibility for members outside service area
Standard business hours only (9 AM-5 PM weekdays) with lunch closure (1-1:30 PM) — no extended or weekend hours
Signature loan rates start at 10.95% APR and line of credit at 12.25% APR — higher than some competitors for unsecured lending
Website does not prominently display membership eligibility criteria or membership application process details
No mention of mobile app, mobile banking, or 24/7 digital-only services on website
best_for: Fontana, California residents and local community members seeking credit union membership benefits
Vehicle buyers looking for competitive auto loan rates with local credit union service
Savers interested in certificate of deposit products with federally-insured accounts
Members preferring member-owned financial institutions over for-profit banks
diagnosis: Fontana Federal Credit Union is best for Fontana-area residents and California members seeking traditional credit union services with NCUA insurance protection, competitive auto loan rates, and member-owned cooperative benefits. The main caveat is the single-location model and standard business hours, which limits accessibility for those requiring multiple branches, extended hours, or serving members outside the local Fontana area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Fontana — Credit Union in Fontana, CA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Fontana — NCUA-insured credit union in Fontana, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
